item.title: Traumatic Nonmissile Penetrating Transnasal Anterior Skull Base Fracture and Brain Injury with Cerebrospinal Fluid Leak: Intraoperative Leak Detection and an Effective Reconstruction Procedure for a Localized Skull Base Defect Especially After Coronavirus Disease 2019 Outbreak.

Glass fragment injury to the craniocervical junction with inter-atlanto-occipital penetration to the subarachnoid space: Not-to-be-missed important aspects of craniocervical trauma even in the middle of the COVID-19 pandemic: a case report with a review of the literature.
